name: Summer Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cauliflower and broccoli florets.
2. Add the chopped onion to the vegetable mixture.
3. Drain the water chestnuts and add them to the bowl.
4. Stir in the frozen peas (once defrosted).
5. In another bowl, combine the mayonnaise, sour cream, garlic salt, and sugar until well mixed.
6. Pour the dressing over the vegetables.
7. Toss everything together until evenly coated.
8. Serve immediately.
